title: fagraea blumei
intro: Fagraea blumei, also known as the Frangipani tree or Kadupul flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fagraea blumei include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Fagraea blumei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal and therapeutic benefits.
